features.description: Single-segment dir/** allow rules no longer auto-approve writes to same-named nested dirs anywhere in the tree
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed single-segment `dir/**` allow rules like `Edit(src/**)` auto-approving writes to nested `dir/` directories anywhere in the tree instead of only `<cwd>/dir`

features.description: Bash permission checks now fail closed on file-descriptor redirect forms the analyzer parsed differently than bash
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed Bash permission checks to fail closed on file-descriptor redirect forms that bash parses differently than the permission analyzer

features.description: Bash commands over 10,000 characters now always prompt instead of being auto-approved
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed Bash permission checks misjudging very long commands — commands over 10,000 characters now always prompt instead of running automatically

features.description: Bash checks now prompt on zsh variable subscripts and modifiers in [[ ]] comparisons instead of treating them as inert
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed Bash permission checks treating zsh variable subscripts and modifiers in `[[ ]]` comparisons as inert text — these commands now prompt for approval

features.description: Bash checks no longer auto-approve help/man commands that could run unsafe options, command substitutions, or backslash
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed Bash permission checks to no longer auto-approve certain `help` and `man` commands that could run unsafe options, command substitutions, or backslash paths

features.description: Permission prompts on remote sessions no longer proceed before the local confirmation dialog resolves
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed permission prompts on remote sessions that could proceed before the local confirmation dialog

features.description: Hooks with exit code 2 now block as documented even when the hook's stdout JSON fails schema validation
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed hooks with exit code 2 not blocking as documented when the hook's stdout JSON fails schema validation

features.description: Single-segment dir/** hook if: conditions now match only <cwd>/dir; use **/dir/** for any-depth matching
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed single-segment `dir/**` hook `if:` conditions to match only `<cwd>/dir`; write `**/dir/**` for any-depth matching. `deny`/`ask` permission rules keep their any-depth match.

features.description: Docker commands with daemon-redirect flags (--url, --connection, --identity, Podman remote) now require permission
features.reference_changelog_line: Added permission prompts for `docker` commands (including the Podman `docker` shim) carrying daemon-redirect flags (`--url`, `--connection`, `--identity`, and Podman's remote mode) that previously ran without one

features.description: file commands using -m/--magic-file or -f/--files-from now require permission instead of being auto-allowed as read-only
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed `file` commands using `-m`/`--magic-file` or `-f`/`--files-from` to require permission instead of being auto-allowed as read-only

features.description: Memory file frontmatter now includes an ISO modified timestamp
features.reference_changelog_line: Added an ISO `modified` timestamp to memory file frontmatter

features.description: OpenTelemetry log events gain message.uuid, client_request_id, and tool_source attributes for correlation and provenance
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `message.uuid`, `client_request_id`, and `tool_source` attributes to OpenTelemetry log events for message-level correlation and tool provenance

features.description: New CLAUDE_CODE_OTEL_CONTENT_MAX_LENGTH configures the 60 KB truncation limit on OpenTelemetry content attributes
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `CLAUDE_CODE_OTEL_CONTENT_MAX_LENGTH` to configure the 60 KB truncation limit on OpenTelemetry content attributes

features.description: Reasoning effort added to the subagentStatusLine payload so custom agent rows can render model and effort
features.reference_changelog_line: Added reasoning effort to the `subagentStatusLine` payload, so custom agent rows can render model and effort

features.description: SessionStart hooks now report source "fork" when a session begins as a fork instead of "resume"
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed SessionStart hooks to report source `"fork"` when a session begins as a fork instead of `"resume"`
